posts.text: Prolonged AI use may make it harder to think critically and creatively, recent research suggests. posts.text: BREAKING: South Korea’s stock market extends losses to -11% on the day just minutes after triggering a circuit breaker.

posts.text:
Please watch out for fraud impersonators.  I don’t have a whatapp trading signal or sell anything to anyone. 

Scammers change one letter of my name and use my picture.  Please be careful
posts.author: BambroughKevin
